data.content: Implementation review approved. Commit 9c664af3 removes all OpenRouter code (4084 deletions across 39 files) and replaces with OpenCode CLI integration. Key changes: openrouter-agent.ts removed, agent-pool.ts simplified to CLI-only targets, settings/schemas/API routes cleaned up. Code is on main, pushed to origin, quality gates passed (tsc, lint, 1855 tests, build).
